loadedFiles.name: sample.java

vulnerabilities.description: The method `testDomain()` contains a dangerous call `Process process = Runtime.getRuntime().exec(...);` at line 25 that processes data without adequate security controls.
vulnerabilities.impact:
An attacker can execute arbitrary OS commands on the server by using shell metacharacters (" ; & | () $ > < 
). This may compromise system integrity or access unauthorized resources.
vulnerabilities.recommendation: Avoid shell command execution entirely. Use HttpURLConnection for HTTP requests instead of invoking "curl" in a subshell.
